api: corona-zahlen.org public JSON API (Robert Koch-Institut derived data; https://api.corona-zahlen.org)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against the current VuePress endpoint docs (Germany, States, Districts, Vaccinations, Maps, Testing). The API is credential-free and read-only; all documented mutations are absent. Tabular JSON list/detail resources are covered by streams, path-parameter-limited aliases are excluded as duplicate_of, and map/legend visualization payloads are excluded as non_data_endpoint.

excluded.reason: Single state/district detail or scoped-history alias of the covered all-states/all-districts collection stream with the same record shape.
